seo.meta_title: Best Logto Alternatives for Next.js Developers (2026)
seo.meta_description: Looking for alternatives to Logto? Compare the top Next.js auth tools — Clerk, Kinde, Better Auth — and find the right fit for your project.
seo.og_title: Best Alternatives to Logto for Next.js
seo.og_description: Top Logto alternatives ranked by Next.js integration score, pricing, and developer experience.

hero.headline: Best Logto Alternatives for Next.js (2026)
hero.subheadline: Logto not quite right? Here are the top alternatives, ranked by how well they integrate with Next.js App Router.

intro_paragraphs: Logto is a solid choice for Next.js authentication — logto is an open-source identity platform that offers both cloud-hosted and self-hosted options. But depending on your budget, team size, or feature requirements, one of these alternatives might be a better fit.

faq.question: Why would I choose something over Logto?
faq.answer: While Logto scores 7/10 for Next.js integration, other tools may offer better pricing at scale (Free – $599/mo with Yes, up to 5,000 MAU), different learning curves, or features that Logto lacks such as smaller community and fewer third-party integrations, next.js sdk is less mature with fewer examples.
